candidate_check.description: Microsoft Defender AV must be configured to check for definition updates daily.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Security Intelligence Updates >> "Specify the day of the week to check for security intelligence updates" is set to "Enabled" and "Every Day" is selected in the drop-down box.
  
Procedure: Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 
HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Signature Updates

Criteria: If the value "ScheduleDay" is REG_DWORD = 0, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Signature Updates >> "Specify the day of the week to check for definition updates" to "Enabled" and select "Every Day" in the drop-down box.
title: Microsoft Defender AV must be configured to check for definition updates daily.
